Idioma.AYUDA_EstaConsultaMuestraUnListadoDeLasC: This Consultation Shows a Listing of the Qualifications for an Employee Depending the Relation of Evaluacion and the Rank of Dates Selected
Idioma.MSG_DebeDigitarLaNotaInferiorYSuperiorPa: Should Enter the Lower and Upper Note for the Note Rank Field
Idioma.MSG_DebeDigitarUnaNotaParaElCampoNotasMa: Should Enter a Note for the Field Greater Notes To
Idioma.MSG_DebeDigitarUnaNotaParaElCampoNotasMe: Should Enter a Note for the Field Smaller Notes To
Idioma.MSG_DebeDigitarUnaOpcionDeNota: Should Enter an Option of Note
